interpretability_note: Content-coherent topics with named technologies (React, AWS, ML) plus role-type groupings (security, DevOps). Handles outliers explicitly. c-TF-IDF top-terms are typically readable without post-hoc curation.
Finer granularity; more niche clusters (payments, observability).
Coarser; a handful of dominant role-type clusters (or skipped if degenerate).
Soft-assigned by argmax W; top-terms reflect corpus axes. Deterministic and fast; less role-type separation than BERTopic.
